arts.ttl: Ben White sets record straight over whether he ‘hates’ football

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief fires cheeky Declan Rice transfer dig amid Arsenal admission
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl has poked fun at Thomas Tuchel's failed pursuit of Arsenal star Declan Rice . This week, former Chelsea manager Tuchel was unveiled as England's manager which will see Rice play under the German tactician - nearly two years after he pushed for his services at club level.

arts.ttl: Coach says US star Tyler Adams is ready for Bournemouth return
arts.sum: Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams remains on track to make his season debut against Arsenal in the Premier League on Saturday. Adams was limited to three Premier League games last season because of a hamstring injury that sidelined him from Sept.

arts.ttl: Risk-taking and high-pressing: Iraola's Bournemouth transformation explained
arts.sum: This time last season, Bournemouth sat 19th in the Premier League without a win in seven games. It is a measure of how far they have come under Andoni Iraola that, despite being five points and six places better off, the prevailing mood is one of frustration.

arts.ttl: When Mikel Arteta can unleash dream Arsenal midfield amid huge injury update - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Arteta was later pressed by a different reporter on whether in the next seven games, the gap between now and the next international break, he could feature. Speaking ahead of the game against Bournemouth this coming weekend he said: “I think he’s not going to be fit for this game.

arts.ttl: Tottenham warn supporters not to sing shocking Mikel Arteta chant during West Ham game as club threaten 'strongest possible action' in email to season ticket holders
arts.sum: Spurs will be back in action on Saturday when they take on West Ham in a London derby following the international break, but supporters have been messaged prior to the match.
